_doc: v11 cycle-mechanism scores. Source of truth read by both the home Macro Overview tile (src/App.jsx) and the v11 page (public/MacroTilt_Macro_Overview_Page_v11.html). The aggregate verdict is COMPUTED from these scores using the same labelFn as v11 — do not pre-compute it here. Refreshed nightly by scripts/compute_v11_mechanisms.py at 22:30 UTC weekdays.
